positions.thesis: Cash equivalent position in short-term Treasury bills. Safety allocation while seeking high-conviction opportunities.
AI growth reacceleration via Agentforce platform. 39% upside to intrinsic value. CRO flagged high expectations risk — sized at 3% not 5%.
positions.invalidation: Agentforce adoption <15% of customer base. Microsoft Dynamics wins major enterprise accounts. 10Y Treasury >5%.

positions.thesis: Healthcare diversification. 29% upside. Uncorrelated with AI theme. CRO flagged binary catalysts in next 60 days — scaled in at 3.5%.
positions.invalidation: MA rate cuts >2%. DOJ antitrust investigation announced. Medical costs spike 300bps above guidance.

positions.thesis: Most overvalued stock in entire S&P 500 screen. 71% overvalued at 92% confidence. Storage cycle peaking. First short position — tests system on both long and short side.
positions.invalidation: AI storage demand accelerates. Hyperscaler HDD orders surge. Acquisition announced at premium.

positions.thesis: AI data centre power bottleneck. Bloom Energy makes solid oxide fuel cells for on-site data centre power. Largest position in Aschenbrenner's fund at 15.87%. $5B Brookfield partnership. $20B total backlog. Revenue guided $3.2B for 2026 (+50% YoY). The market prices BE as an energy company - it's an AI infrastructure company.
positions.invalidation: Data centre power demand slows. Grid capacity expands faster than expected. Insider selling accelerates. Natural gas spike makes fuel cells uneconomic.

positions.thesis: Short duration bet against long-term treasuries. Rates higher for longer thesis.
positions.invalidation: Fed pivots to aggressive rate cuts. Recession triggers flight to safety.

positions.thesis: Most undervalued stock in S&P 500 screen. DCF intrinsic value $500 vs market price $314. AI semiconductor leader with custom ASIC solutions for hyperscalers.
positions.invalidation: ASIC demand slows. VMware integration struggles. Hyperscaler insourcing accelerates.

positions.thesis: Creative software moat with Firefly AI monetisation. 36.7% upside to intrinsic value. Staged entry around March 20 earnings. CRO approved conditional — needs Firefly adoption >20% for size-up.
positions.invalidation: Firefly adoption <10% at March 20 earnings. Canva enterprise launch. Microsoft Copilot creative tools bundled with O365.

positions.thesis: 92% search share, $73B FCF, Gemini integration, Cloud acceleration. CRO flagged AI correlation with AVGO — sized at 3% not 5% accordingly.
positions.invalidation: DOJ breakup accelerates. Gemini revenue contribution <$2B. Search revenue declines YoY.

positions.thesis: Diversified alt asset manager, 10.2x forward P/E, 30% upside. Diversifies portfolio away from pure tech/AI theme. CRO cited KKR 2007 analogue but current cycle is earlier stage.
positions.invalidation: Net inflows turn negative. 10Y Treasury >5%. Regional banking stress resurfaces. Private market valuations correct 20%+.
